title: Migration and Asylum Project (MAP) invites applications for Catalyst for Change Fellowship 2026- 2027
description: Migration and Asylum Project (MAP) is inviting applications for its Catalyst for Change Fellowship 2026- 2027.Title: CFC FellowLocation: Aizawl, Mizoram (on-site)Duration: 24 monthsMonthly Stipend: ₹45,000 (subject to applicable TDS) along with other benefits.Starting Date: 15 August, 2026What does the Programme Offer?The Fellows will have an unparalleled opportunity to spend twenty-four months gaining both academic, legal and field experience working in the areas of migration, women’s rights, p
